title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: Jordan Urbs reviews the ZimaBoard 2, a compact self-hosting device, and demonstrates setting up OpenClaw (a community fork of leaked Cloud Code) with Venice AI and a Telegram bot for local AI inference without cloud dependency. The stack includes Apify for web scraping and runs various open models including Gemma, GLM5, and others through a local interface.
